user.title: Ratebook
user.description: Pick your utility's plan from the bundled real US tariffs, or paste a Ratebook tariff JSON. On tiered plans (PG&E, SCE, ConEd…), pick the tier your household usually lands in so prices match your bill.

data.tariff_json: Custom tariff JSON (used only when Utility plan is "Custom")

data_description.tariff_source: Utility not listed? Open a "Request a utility" issue on GitHub and it can usually be added within days.
data_description.tier: Tier 1 = within your baseline allowance. If your bill regularly shows tier 2/3 usage, pick that tier — marginal prices differ by 25-50% on some plans.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ratebook
reconfigure.description: Switch the utility plan, usage tier, charge-window length, or currency.

data.tariff_json: Custom tariff JSON (used only when Utility plan is "Custom")

data_description.tariff_source: Utility not listed? Open a "Request a utility" issue on GitHub and it can usually be added within days.
data_description.tier: Tier 1 = within your baseline allowance. If your bill regularly shows tier 2/3 usage, pick that tier — marginal prices differ by 25-50% on some plans.

error.invalid_tariff: That tariff could not be loaded. Check the JSON, or pick a bundled utility plan.
